S1.name: Failed Logon
S1.recommendationTemplate: Check the source host {{source_host}} and the user {{user_name}}.

S2.name: Successful Logon after Failures
S2.recommendationTemplate: User {{user_name}} successfully logged in after several failed attempts. Check the source host {{source_host}}.

S3.name: Account Lockout
S3.recommendationTemplate: User {{user_name}} has been locked out. Check scheduled tasks and services using this account.

S4.name: Kerberos Pre-Auth Failure
S4.recommendationTemplate: Kerberos pre-authentication failure for user {{user_name}}. Check domain controller time synchronization and verify the password.

S5.name: Kerberos TGT/TGS Failure
S5.recommendationTemplate: Kerberos ticket issuance failure for user {{user_name}}. Check ticket validity and related services.

S6.name: User Created
S6.recommendationTemplate: A new user {{user_name}} was created. Review assigned permissions and group memberships.

S7.name: User Deleted
S7.recommendationTemplate: User {{user_name}} was deleted. Verify who deleted the account and for what purpose.

S8.name: Added to Group
S8.recommendationTemplate: User {{user_name}} was added to group {{target_group}}. Verify the criticality of this group.

S9.name: Removed from Group
S9.recommendationTemplate: User {{user_name}} was removed from group {{target_group}}. Verify the criticality of this group.

S10.name: AD Object Change
S10.recommendationTemplate: Active Directory object {{object_name}} was modified. Review which attributes were changed and by whom.

S11.name: GPO Changed
S11.recommendationTemplate: Group Policy Object {{object_name}} was modified. Review the criticality and author of the changes.

S12.name: GPO Application Error
S12.recommendationTemplate: Failed to apply GPO {{policy_name}} on {{target_host}}. Check domain controller availability and network connectivity.

S13.name: Service Account Login from New Host
S13.recommendationTemplate: Service account {{user_name}} logged in from a new host {{source_host}}. Verify whether this activity is legitimate.

S14.name: Frequent Service Account Login Failures
S14.recommendationTemplate: Service account {{user_name}} has frequent failed login attempts. Check the password and dependent services.

S15.name: AD Replication Issue
S15.recommendationTemplate: Active Directory replication issues detected on {{target_host}}. Check network connectivity and domain controller health.

S16.name: DC Restart / Unavailable
S16.recommendationTemplate: Domain controller {{target_host}} was restarted or became unavailable. Investigate the root cause.

S17.name: Time Skew / Kerberos Issue
S17.recommendationTemplate: Time skew or Kerberos-related issues detected on {{target_host}}. Verify time synchronization settings.

S18.name: Logon from Unusual Host
S18.recommendationTemplate: User {{user_name}} logged in from an unusual host {{source_host}}. Verify whether this behavior is expected.

S19.name: Logon at Unusual Time
S19.recommendationTemplate: User {{user_name}} logged in at an unusual time. Verify working hours and expected activity.

S20.name: Mass Failed Logons (Password Spraying)
S20.recommendationTemplate: Multiple failed login attempts detected from host {{source_host}}. Investigate possible password spraying activity.

S21.name: Repeated Incident
S21.recommendationTemplate: This incident has occurred repeatedly. Review incident history and previously applied resolutions.

S22.name: New / Unseen Event
S22.recommendationTemplate: A new or previously unseen event type {{event_type}} was detected. Check the source host {{source_host}}.
